prompt: Create a premium flat vector ICON ONLY for a coffee gear review brand. Motif: magnifying glass + coffee bean. No text, no letters, no words. Transparent background. Clean geometric style, high contrast, thick readable strokes for favicon use. Warm palette: #2C1810 #5C3D2E #7A5B4A #EFDFCE with optional tiny #059669 accent. No gradients, no shadows, no mockup.
